title: Oddysey Craft
description: You create a new survival world. After looking around for a bit, you find a village. As you happily begin exploring it, you step into a purple, fantasy-themed biome. You realize your adventure has just begun.
body:
OddyseyCraft is a fantasy-themed mod for Minecraft. The mod currently only supports Minecraft Forge 1.20.1.

 

Features:

-4 New biomes

-2 New dimensions

-2 New ores

-Tons of new items

-A new villager profession

-Alot of new blocks

 

Details: There are 4 new biomes: The Azure Fairy Forest, The Purple Peak Forest, The Emerald Rainforest and The Whispering Woods.

Purple Peak Forest:

-can be found in overworld

 

Whispering woods:

-can be found in overworld

 

Azure Fairy Forest:

-can only be found in The Fairyland dimension.

 

Emerald Rainforest:

-can be found in the Emerald Enclave dimension.

 

The Fairyland (new dimension):

The portal is made like an obsidian portal, for the portal frame you need a block called "Azure Fairy Stone" and to ignite the portal, you need an item called "Awakened Violet Veinstone Gem". You can get these items by trading with a villager of the new villager profession.

Emerald Enclave (dimension added in v1.0.1)
You can make a portal out of emerald blocks like you would with a nether portal. Use the emerald heart to craft it. I won't spoil more, I wish you luck exploring this dimension!

 

The Adventurer (new villager profession)

-you can make a villager have this profession by having him go to a Ritual Table.

 

Ritual Table:

-can be crafted with the recipe shown in the mod images above

 

And lots of other items and blocks that are up to YOU to find out about!

 

I hope you enjoy my Mod, I am only a solo developer and don't have much time to work on my projects, I will try to make updates as frequently as possible!
